title: AnalyticsEvent
description: Canonical behavioral event ledger. One row per business event captured. Immutable after status transitions to a terminal state (delivered / partially_delivered / suppressed_by_consent / suppressed_by_sampling / suppressed_by_provider_off). Snapshots attribution + consent + context at CREATE time; those columns are frozen and NEVER rewritten by later state changes.

event_name.description: Event name in snake_case or Colon-scoped form. Examples: `feature_viewed`, `funnel_step_reached`, `experiment_variant_assigned`, `feature_used:calendar`. Matched against enabled_event_types patterns on each provider config.

event_kind.description: Enum: track / identify / page / screen / alias / group. Analytics-provider verbs.

category.description: Enum: feature_use / funnel_step / cta / error / performance / experiment / lifecycle / session. Coarse taxonomy for reporting rollups.

subject_type.description: Polymorphic subject class. `Academorix\User\Models\User` for identified users; `Academorix\Growth\Analytics\Models\AnalyticsIdentity` for anonymous subjects.

subject_id.description: Subject primary key. For anonymous events: the AnalyticsIdentity.id (aid_). For identified events: the User.id (usr_).

anonymous_id.description: UUID assigned to the browser/device on first visit. Populated for events fired PRE-identify. When a subject later identifies, MergeAliasedEventsJob rewrites subject_id from the AnalyticsIdentity.id to the User.id but preserves anonymous_id for audit.

properties.description: Event-specific properties. Provider-agnostic — each driver's ProviderPayloadTransformer maps to provider-native shape. Max 100 keys, max 1KB total serialised. PII scanned + refused at CREATE.

context.description: Standard context: device (id, type, manufacturer, model), os (name, version), browser (name, version), locale, timezone, ip_hash (SHA-256), user_agent_family (never raw UA).

attribution.description: Snapshot from growth::attribution at CREATE time. Frozen thereafter. Contains: utm (source, medium, campaign, term, content), click_ids (gclid, fbclid, ttclid, msclkid, sccid), first_touch, last_touch, referrer, landing_page, session_id.

consent_snapshot.description: Snapshot of subject's consent state at CREATE time. Shape: { analytics: bool, functional: bool, essential: bool, marketing: bool, ai_training: bool }. Dispatch checks this AGAIN at DISPATCH time — a subject who revokes consent between capture + dispatch has the pending event suppressed.

status.description: Enum: pending / dispatching / delivered / partially_delivered / suppressed_by_consent / suppressed_by_sampling / suppressed_by_provider_off.

eligible_provider_count.description: Computed at CREATE: count of active providers whose enabled_event_types matches event_name AND whose sampling roll succeeds AND whose consent gate passes.

delivered_provider_count.description: Updated as AnalyticsDelivery rows transition to state=delivered. When == eligible_provider_count, status → delivered. Else on all attempts exhausted, status → partially_delivered.

deduplication_key.description: Optional idempotency key for critical events (payment_succeeded, subscription_upgraded). Providers with native dedupe (Mixpanel $insert_id, Amplitude insert_id) receive this. Volume-heavy sampling events don't set it — the whole point is sampling drops them.

session_id.description: UUID scoping this event to a session. Sessions expire after 30 min of inactivity per attribution module semantics.

event_time.description: When the event actually occurred (may differ from created_at for backfilled or queued events). Providers receive event_time as their timestamp field — NOT created_at.

indexes.name: analytics_events_tenant_time_idx
indexes.description: Primary read path for tenant admin event log — reverse-ordered by event_time.

indexes.name: analytics_events_tenant_category_time_idx
indexes.description: Category rollup: 'how many funnel_step events last 24h?'

indexes.name: analytics_events_subject_time_idx
indexes.description: Per-subject event stream: 'this user did what in the last week?'

indexes.name: analytics_events_anonymous_idx
indexes.description: MergeAliasedEventsJob scans by anonymous_id to rewrite subject_id.

indexes.name: analytics_events_tenant_status_idx
indexes.description: Retry-sweep scan: 'events in tenant X still in dispatching status'.

properties.description: Free-form event properties. Max 1KB total serialised. PII refused at CREATE.

user_agent_family.description: Coarse UA family ('Chrome', 'Safari'). NEVER full UA string.

attribution.description: Frozen at CREATE from growth::attribution snapshot.

is_terminal.description: Computed. True when status IN (delivered, partially_delivered, suppressed_*).

notes: context.ip_hash + user_agent_family HIDDEN on tenant-facing wire (recording internals; not admin-facing).
AnalyticsEvent is READ-ONLY over HTTP — no PATCH/DELETE/POST routes. Events only enter via the listener path (AnalyticsEventCapturer).
